UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTOINE, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 301 KING STREET, #503, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94158, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79890769)
